an3.77:1.0.1: Then the Venerable Ānanda approached the Blessed One … and said to him:
an3.77:1.0.2: (1) "If, Ānanda, there were no kamma ripening in the sensory realm, would sense-sphere existence be discerned?"
an3.77:1.0.3: (2) "If, Ānanda, there were no kamma ripening in the form realm, would form-sphere existence be discerned?"
an3.77:1.0.4: (3) "If, Ānanda, there were no kamma ripening in the formless realm, would formless-sphere existence be discerned?.
